## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production back on track: 6 articles completed, 2 published, 3-4 weekly target](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [SEO performance improving: articles breaking into top 10-20 rankings for key terms](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New hire (Cody) starting Monday to enhance content operations and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Full Story tool set up for better website analytics; Qualified integration pending](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Strategy

  - [6 articles completed since last call, addressing edits on one](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [Publishing 3-4 articles per week, catching up after delays](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Mix of foundational topics (e.g., "What is data integration?") and modern themes (e.g., "Reducing IT dependency")](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Covering pillars: data engineering, democratization, strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Quick turnaround on data lake/warehouse article with Lake House and Iceberg additions](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

### SEO Performance Metrics

  - [Impressions trending upward (primary focus at this stage)](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Some articles breaking into top 10-15 rankings (e.g., "Data engineering skills")](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [280+ keywords tracked, many relevant to target topics (e.g., "ETL modernization")](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [Google Analytics shows similar trends to Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Traffic from AI sources: Anthropic (major), Mistral (unexpectedly high), one hit from GPT](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Website Analytics and User Profiling

  - [Full Story tool set up by agency for better demographic information](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Qualified integration pending for more granular account-level data](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Goal: Understanding if blog readers match Ideal Customer Profile (ICP)](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

### New Content Operations Hire

  - [Cody starting Monday to enhance content strategy and operations](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Will bridge gap between website analytics and content planning](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Expected to increase bandwidth and attention to content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)

### AI Integration in Content Process

  - [Cody seen as complementary to GrowthX, not competition](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Aim for "1+1=3" synergy between Cody and GrowthX efforts](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Focus on using AI to enhance content quality, not generate low-quality material](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Export and share keyword data from Looker report with team](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Vivek to review Matt's comments on proposed topics and respond](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Ashley to connect Vivek with Evan for Qualified setup](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Team to prepare for Cody's onboarding next week](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Continue ramping up content production and refining strategy](https://fathom.video/share/yvTaDy6UvCissbHWrBr3P-rdk_VitM9X?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
